title: "[AI] "

## Objective
One-sentence target outcome.

## In scope
- exact behavior to add/change
- likely files/modules involved
- constraints

## Out of scope
- unrelated refactors
- renames
- dependency upgrades
- workflow changes
- style-only cleanup

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] behavior implemented
- [ ] focused tests added or updated
- [ ] no unrelated file churn
- [ ] assumptions documented
- [ ] risks documented

## Technical notes
Known invariants, trust boundaries, dangerous paths, performance constraints.
